title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Pi is an agent framework that enables flexible integration through a "harness" layer. The video compares Pi's architecture against other coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Antigravity, examining how products incorporate increasingly complex harness mechanisms.
